summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of MA LAKSHMI RADIO SALES & SERVICE product card and modal features. All 20 test scenarios tested via Playwright browser automation. App uses MOCKED SheetDB API (demo data fallback expected). All critical flows pass.

ui_bugs.issue: DemoBanner component does not have data-testid='demo-banner' attribute, making it untestable by exact selector. Found via class fallback.

issues: 'Call / WhatsApp for Best Price' badge renders correctly with yellow-50 bg and yellow-700 text - good contrast

action_items: Optional: Add data-testid='demo-banner' to DemoBanner component for more robust automated testing
critical_code_review_comments: All product card features correctly implemented - cards show name + price only (no features/CTA buttons on card)
ProductDetailModal fully functional: image gallery, thumbnails, prev/next navigation, tabs (Specs/Desc/Warranty), WhatsApp+Call CTAs
Specs rendered in Flipkart-style 2-column grid with section headers and thin border-t separator lines
Modal close: X button, overlay click, and Escape key all work correctly
Mobile layout (375px): full-width modal, vertically stacked, all CTAs accessible
Price formatting correct: ₹18,999 for priced products; 'Call for Price' on cards and 'Call/WhatsApp for Best Price' in modal for no-price products
Image badges (+2, +1) correctly shown based on images array length
No tab visibility tested for products missing specs/description/warranty - all demo products have all 3 fields, not testable with current demo data

success_rate.frontend: 95% (19/20 tests passed; 1 not testable with demo data)

test_credentials: None required - frontend-only app with demo data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend-only app at http://localhost:3000. Uses demoData.js (REACT_APP_SHEETDB_ENABLED=false). Key products: tv-001 (Samsung 32, 3 images, price 18999, full specs/desc/warranty), tv-004 (Samsung 24, 1 image, no price). All modal features working. The DemoBanner is missing data-testid attribute. Tested on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (375x844). Backend is FATAL (no backend needed). Public URL https://demobackend.emergentagent.com shows Route not found - use localhost:3000 for testing.
mocked_apis: SheetDB API MOCKED - app uses demoData.js fallback (expected behavior per requirements)
